title: He Built a Secret Snake House… Then This Happened 😳🐍
description: He Built a Secret Snake House… Then This Happened 😳🐍
prompt_text: A lush tropical jungle setting featuring a giant cobra-shaped bamboo structure at the river's edge. An elderly South Asian man with a white beard, wearing a tank top and plaid shorts, moves through various rooms of his intricately crafted bamboo home. The interior includes cobra motifs on walls and doors, bamboo furniture, and a modern kitchen. The environment is vibrant green with natural light filtering through the canopy.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A lush tropical jungle setting featuring a giant cobra-shaped bamboo structure at the river's edge. An elderly South Asian man with a white beard, wearing a tank top and plaid shorts, moves through various rooms of his intricately crafted bamboo home. The interior includes cobra motifs on walls and doors, bamboo furniture, and a modern kitchen. The environment is vibrant green with natural light filtering through the canopy.

cinematography.cameraShot: A series of medium shots and wide angles following the man through the structure, transitioning with quick cuts as he enters different rooms.

actions: The man enters the cobra-shaped structure from the river while tigers approach.
He walks through a bamboo hallway decorated with snake carvings.
He enters a living area and sits on a bamboo sofa.
He transitions to a bamboo kitchen and begins cooking.
He walks into a bedroom with a cobra-shaped door and sits on the bed.
The man speaks directly to the camera, gesturing for likes and subscriptions.
dialogue: Man says: 'Please like, share, comment, and subscribe.'
[Rhythmic tropical background music with flutes and drums]
